profile.name: Samih Elkhider
profile.title: Software Engineer · Product Developer
profile.bio: I design and ship thoughtful software — from SwiftUI mobile apps and watchOS companions to full-stack web platforms and enterprise documentation systems.

projects.title: Maison Sale
projects.short: Luxury resale marketplace with AI visual search, real-time bidding, and a watchOS companion app.
projects.full: A luxury resale marketplace for iOS with a full onboarding flow, AI-powered visual search, real-time bidding, and an embedded watchOS companion app. Built with SwiftUI, featuring Figma-aligned design tokens and persistent navigation.

projects.title: Floom
projects.short: Personal finance app with budgeting, bill tracking, milestones, and biometric app lock via Keychain.
projects.full: A personal finance app for tracking budgets, bills, and milestones. Features SwiftData persistence, biometric gate via Keychain, secure profile storage, and a clean tab-based navigation with dashboard analytics.

projects.title: Sudan HealthCare Hub
projects.short: End-to-end healthcare platform documentation — BRD, BPMN flows, ERD data model, and Jira backlog management.
projects.full: Comprehensive healthcare platform documentation including BRD, BPMN process flows, ERD data model, UAT test cases, Figma wireframe briefs, and a full Jira backlog with automated import scripts for the SHH project.

projects.title: bits3 Corporate Website
projects.short: Bilingual corporate site with a headless CMS dashboard, dark/light mode, and fully editable content.
projects.full: A bilingual (EN/AR) corporate website with Next.js 15 frontend, Strapi 5 headless CMS, dark/light theming, Docker deployment, and a custom admin dashboard for managing portfolio, blog, team, and services content.

projects.title: Maison Watch
projects.short: watchOS companion for Maison Sale with bidding, payments, and inbox messaging.
projects.full: watchOS companion for Maison Sale featuring product browsing, bidding confirmation modals, payment flow, order confirmation, and inbox messaging — all designed for the Apple Watch form factor.

projects.title: Online Avenues
projects.short: Product wireframes and UX flows for an online education platform.
projects.full: Product wireframes and UX flows for an online education platform, covering user journeys, screen layouts, and interaction patterns for web and mobile experiences.
